meta.title: Gogh Canvas
meta.description: A freeform canvas for WordPress — drag anything anywhere on the live page.
meta.author: jamiemarsland

steps.code:
99, 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_title' => 'Try Gogh Canvas', 'post_content' => '

Welcome! This page is your canvas. The template picker should be open — choose a Hero and start dragging things around. Or click "Make freeform" on the section below to convert ordinary blocks.

This section was built in Gutenberg

Click the ✨ Make freeform button on it and it becomes a draggable canvas, pixel for pixel.

Star it on GitHub
' ) );
